displayTitle: Knights of the Old Republic #24: Knights of Suffering, Part 3
synopsis: Zayne Carrick's murderous masters have hunted him halfway across the galaxy. Now, his run ends with him cornered in the very place where it began-in the Jedi Temple of Taris, the current headquarters of invading Mandalorian leader Cassus Fett! Zayne's escaped before-with help from his friends and the Force-but not this time! His only choice is to fight for his life, in mortal combat with his far more talented teacher! It's the shattering conclusion to the yearlong "Days/Knights" sequence-and not everyone makes it out alive! The Knights of the Old Republic series-will never be the same again!
title: Knights of the Old Republic #24: Knights of Suffering, Part 3
